task.summary: Export a new KDNA domain created from locked judgment cards.

route_decision.reason: The user is turning raw expertise into a KDNA domain asset.

items.summary: Only human-locked judgment can compile into KDNA.
items.result: Export proceeded only after Human Lock checks passed.

items.summary: Check locked cards, boundaries, and self-check specificity.

self_checks.question: Are judgment-class cards human locked before export?
self_checks.reason: All exported judgment cards contain human lock evidence.
self_checks.evidence: human_lock.by present on exported axiom and boundary cards.

risk_events.reason: The domain is structurally ready but lacks external expert review.

final_judgment.summary: The domain may be exported, but its quality badge must not exceed available evidence.
final_judgment.recommended_next_action: Add eval cases and expert review before claiming stable quality.

limits: The report validates governance and packaging evidence, not real-world domain effectiveness.
The domain should not be marketed as production-ready.
